source_file: Jungle Clear Compilation S16_2026 - Jungle clear S16_2026.pdf
title: Season 16/2026 Jungle Clear Compilation

document_notes.search_tip: Use Ctrl+F to search for any champion.
document_notes.sort_tip: Select the entire sheet, use sort range, then select the category to sort by.
document_notes.details_tip: Runes are often found in the video. More details and alternative versions may be in the notes/details field or video description/comments.

entries.notes: AD/AD, 2 smite AS ver. 2 smite HPF ver.

off_meta_junglers.description: See them once/twice a season, unpopular picks that have their uses.

outdated_clears.description: Old clears that don't have a newer version yet.

appendix.AD: Attack Damage. Rune shard Row 1/2 Option 1.
appendix.AP: Ability Power. Rune shard Row 1/2 Option 1.
appendix.AS: Attack Speed. Rune shard Row 1 Option 2.
appendix.AH: Ability Haste. Rune shard Row 1 Option 3.
appendix.MS: Movement Speed. Rune shard Row 2 Option 2.
appendix.T&SR: Tenacity and Slow Resist. Rune shard Row 3 Option 2.
appendix.HPF: Flat Health, 65 health. Rune shard Row 3 Option 1.
appendix.HPS: Scaling Health, 10-180 health. Rune shard Row 3 Option 3.
appendix.Fleet: Fleet Footwork rune. Precision tree. Row 1 Option 3.
appendix.Alac: Legend: Alacrity rune. Precision tree. Row 3 Option 1.
appendix.Haste: Legend: Haste rune. Precision tree. Row 3 Option 2.
appendix.Nimbus: Nimbus Cloak rune. Sorcery tree. Row 2 Option 3.
appendix.ABSF: Absolute Focus rune. Sorcery tree. Row 3 Option 3.
appendix.Biscuit: Biscuit Delivery rune. Inspiration tree. Row 3 Option 3.
appendix.Cosmic: Cosmic Insight rune. Inspiration tree. Row 4 Option 1.
